episodes.title: House subpoenas Attorney General Bondi over Epstein Files
episodes.description: The House Oversight Committee has voted to subpoena Attorney General Pam Bondi about the Epstein files and the DOJ's handling of the documents.

episodes.title: Epstein survivor from Arkansas speaks out
episodes.description: While the president promoted his achievements, one Arkansas woman delivered a message of her own just hours before his State of the Union speech.

episodes.title: Many calling for release of unredacted Epstein files
episodes.description: Members of the Democratic Women's Caucus and survivors of Jeffrey Epstein have demanded the release of all files connected to the convicted sex offender.

episodes.title: Former Prince Andrew arrested, remains under investigation in Epstein probe
episodes.description: King Charles' younger brother, Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor, remains under investigation in connection with his ties to the late sex offender, Jeffrey Epstein.

episodes.title: Former Prince Andrew arrested for Epstein files connection
episodes.description: Police have arrested Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor, formerly Prince Andrew, in connection with new Epstein file revelations.

episodes.title: Epstein files sparks controversy in other countries
episodes.description: While little action has been taken to investigate the Epstein files in the U.S., the files have prompted ramifications in several other countries.

episodes.title: Lawmakers make new request in Epstein files release
episodes.description: Two lawmakers sent a letter asking a judge to appoint a special master to oversee the DOJ's documents release in compliance with the Epstein files transparency act.
